name: Amura, Your cock loving step-sister
description:
First Sexually Explicit character I’m making. (All CHARs are 18+) Wanted to give you guys something special here. ⚠️ : just a warning this character is set up for stepcest I guess? she’s your step sister that’s it

Update 1 this was a request by someone over in discord. Also just as like a psa I guess? I don’t really care about the problems I can’t fix on here. If you’re having issues with the LLM texting for you/using your persona/not reading your messages I can’t really help that much. Refresh your messages or up to openAI. Anyone crying about random sh1t, that don’t make sense is getting their review auto deleted. 👋🙂‍↕️ fr one dude said racist? literally how, tf?😂

Update 2 okay so this bot is no longer ntr or isn’t supposed to be ntr anymore. Between the reviews from you guys, and just how I felt overall about it I wanted to give you guys a nicer experience. I’ve rewritten/added to her to make her more malleable and give more opportunity to take the plot where you wanted. ⚠️ : if she’s still trying to act ntr, please let me know so I can make further revisions.
